documentation.when_to_use: Use during the 'any' phase against surfaces [web] in the wireless_ble_ext category. Fits when the engagement needs: RTL8812AU/21AU and RTL8814AU Wireless drivers Only for use with Linux & Android.
documentation.why_to_use: Prefer this tool based on upstream description: RTL8812AU/21AU and RTL8814AU Wireless drivers Only for use with Linux & Android.
documentation.how_to_use: Install/setup: git clone -b v5.6.4.2 https://github.com/aircrack-ng/rtl8812au.git. Run the primary entrypoint as shown in upstream docs, e.g. `sed -i 's/CONFIG_PLATFORM_I386_PC = y/CONFIG_PLATFORM_I386_PC = n/g' Makefile`. Further invocations from upstream: `sed -i 's/CONFIG_PLATFORM_ARM_RPI = n/CONFIG_PLATFORM_ARM_RPI = y/g' Makefile`; `sed -i 's/CONFIG_PLATFORM_ARM64_RPI = n/CONFIG_PLATFORM_ARM64_RPI = y/g' Makefile`. RTL8812AU/21AU and RTL8814AU Wireless drivers Only for use with Linux & Android.
